headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 24, 2026**
article:
The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Ozzie Albies leading the charge at the plate. Albies hit a home run (5) on a fly ball to right center field, driving in 4 runs. In other action, the Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, including 2 RBIs. The Chicago Cubs edged out the Philadelphia Phillies 7-8 in a close game, while the San Diego Padres secured a hard-fought win over the Colorado Rockies, outscoring them 10-8.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Baltimore Orioles right-hander Dean Kremer, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right quad strain. Other players on the injured list include Texas Rangers left-hander Robert Garcia, New York Mets shortstop Francisco Lindor, Atlanta Braves left-hander Dylan Dodd, San Diego Padres right-hander Bryan Hoeing, Texas Rangers left fielder Wyatt Langford, Philadelphia Phillies right-hander Max Lazar, and Philadelphia Phillies catcher J.T. Realmuto.

The Chicago Cubs have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring infielder Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. Lopez joins the Cubs after being traded from the Rockies.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Nationals 7-2**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, with Ozzie Albies leading the charge at the plate. Albies hit a home run (5) on a fly ball to right center field, driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Brewers in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4 in a closely contested matchup. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, including 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cubs Comeback: Phillies Fall 7-8**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged out the Philadelphia Phillies 7-8 in a close game. Brandon Marsh led the Phillies with 3 hits, including 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Rockies in Thrilling 10-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a hard-fought win over the Colorado Rockies, outscoring them 10-8. Mickey Moniak led the Padres' offense with a 4-hit, 2-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Orioles' Kremer Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right-hander Dean Kremer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right quad strain, retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Cubs Acquire Nicky Lopez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring infielder Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. Lopez joins the Cubs after being traded from the Rockies.
